use_cases: Displaying confirmation dialogs for user actions like delete or submit
Showing form content or settings in a focused modal container
Presenting alerts, warnings, or informational messages with overlay backdrop
Revealing additional content or options triggered by user interaction
Capturing user input through contained forms within a modal interface
ai_summary: A lightweight modal dialog component built on Radix UI primitives with smooth fade and zoom animations. The overlay features a semi-transparent dark backdrop while the content panel centers on screen with rounded corners and subtle shadow. Includes built-in close button, portal rendering, and responsive sizing optimized for both desktop and mobile viewports.
